burial.plot_notes: East Cemetery, Manchester CT. Per her wishes her body was first donated to Yale Medical Center; subsequently buried East Cemetery Manchester.

parents.father_research_notes: Father not named in 1969 obituary. Per obituary mother Anna Louise Foote Jessup of Hartford and grandfather Nathaniel Foote (NY State Supreme Court Justice). Foote line uncertain — does NOT match the existing 16 Foote-related Hooker descendants in JSON (those branch from the Lee MA / Cooperstown NY / Goshen CT line via Eunice Newton Foote). Janet's Rochester NY Foote line is a separate branch; Hooker descent not confirmed.
parents.mother_research_notes: Mother Anna Louise Foote Jessup. Per Jalapeño Rule, not built.

sources.label: Janet J. Olcott obituary, ca.September 1969
sources.note: Local Manchester newspaper. Lists League of Women Voters service, Vassar 1930, Aetna programmer career, body donated Yale Medical.

narrative_blocks.header: League of Women Voters secretary; Vassar 1930
narrative_blocks.body: Janet was a Vassar College graduate (1930), a computer programmer at Aetna Life and Casualty Co. in Hartford, and a leading civic figure in Manchester Connecticut — secretary of both the Manchester and Connecticut Leagues of Women Voters, member of the Manchester Fire Protection Study Commission, and organizer of the Great Books Club of Manchester (one of the oldest in the country). Her body was donated to Yale Medical Center per her wishes.

career.notes: Also secretary of Connecticut League of Women Voters.
One of the oldest Great Books clubs in the country.

naming_inspiration.description: Middle name carries his paternal grandmother Adeline Cheney Olcott's maiden surname forward — her family was the Manchester Cheney silk-manufacturing dynasty.

burialCemetery.name: East Cemetery
burialCemetery.notes: Manchester Connecticut municipal cemetery. Burial site of Polly Olcott Belden (HD3416) and her husband Donald L. Belden (I00356); Roger Olcott (HD3417) and both of his wives Janet Jessup Olcott (I00357) and Dorothy Denton Olcott (I00358).

INST037.name: Vassar College
INST037.notes: Founded 1861 Poughkeepsie NY. One of the original Seven Sisters colleges. HOOKER TREE CONNECTION: Lucy Maria Edwards Remy (HD2224), daughter of John Stark Edwards (HD2183), granddaughter of Jonathan Edwards Jr. and great-great-great-granddaughter of Thomas Hooker, attended Vassar. Her obituary (Indianapolis newspaper, Dec 31, 1925) notes she attended the college and was "regarded as a woman of high intellectual attainments." Also: Louise Tayler-Jones (, Wellesley 1896 — though she is NOT a Hooker descendant, being from the second Tayler marriage).

INST122.primary_name: Yale School of Medicine (Medical Institution of Yale College)
INST122.name: Yale School of Medicine (Medical Institution of Yale College)
INST122.notes:
Founded 1810 as the Medical Institution of Yale College, the fourth oldest medical school in the United States.
